name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B
note: Largest R1 distill: Llama-3.3-70B fine-tuned on R1 reasoning traces, the most popular self-hostable strong reasoner from the release.
tpsNote: Q4_K_M needs ~40-42GB, exceeding a single 24GB 4090; community reports ~12-15 tok/s on dual RTX 3090 (48GB) setups.

results.notes: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.1 breakdown, Humanity's Last Exam row, verified live: DeepSeek R1 Distill Llama 70B = 6%. Not previously tracked for this model (corpus's 5 existing results are all from the HF model card: AIME/MATH/GPQA/LiveCodeBench/Codeforces). Note the AA GPQA Diamond figure for this model (40%) diverges substantially from the HF self-reported 65.2 already in the corpus — that duplicate benchmarkSlug was intentionally NOT re-added per instructions, but is worth flagging as a discrepancy for a future accuracy pass.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via HF model card. License verified against the DeepSeek-R1 GitHub License section, which states this distill 'is derived from Llama3.3-70B-Instruct and is originally licensed under Llama3.3 license' (not MIT, despite the base repo being MIT) - matches the record. All 5 result rows confirmed literally on the HF card.
